/usr/bin/ar qc libocudu_polar.a CMakeFiles/ocudu_polar.dir/polar_allocator_impl.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ocudu_polar.dir/polar_code_impl.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ocudu_polar.dir/polar_deallocator_impl.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ocudu_polar.dir/polar_decoder_impl.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ocudu_polar.dir/polar_encoder_impl.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ocudu_polar.dir/polar_interleaver_impl.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ocudu_polar.dir/polar_rate_dematcher_impl.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ocudu_polar.dir/polar_rate_matcher_impl.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libocudu_polar.a
